farmer.name: Mina
lines: Watered crops grow with a little extra courage.
Strawberries are gentle, but pumpkins like to take their time.

fisher.name: Finn
fisher.greeting: The river is calm. Good fishing weather.
lines: Some fish bite quickly, and some make you wait.
Try a pond when you want something unusual.

shopkeeper.name: Poppy
shopkeeper.greeting: Welcome in. I kept the seed shelf tidy for you.
lines: A full bag of seeds is the start of a good morning.
Bring crops back any time if you want to sell them.

villager.name: Nori
villager.greeting: I hope your pet is having a cozy day.
lines: The village feels warmer when the lamps turn on.
A bench near flowers is my favorite place to rest.
